metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for RedwoodSDK development, plugin creation, and skill authoring

plugins.name: rwsdk-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive RedwoodSDK development toolkit — documentation lookup, frontend debugging, shadcn/ui management, production auditing, and doc sync. Includes 5 skills and 6 slash commands for building full-stack React Server Component apps on Cloudflare Workers.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with evals, benchmarks, and description optimization.
